_description: Accessible typography tokens. Sizes use rem (root = 16px). Line heights follow WCAG 1.4.8 and 1.4.12 spacing requirements.

sans.note: System font stack — no download, no FOUT, respects user's OS preference

dyslexic.note: Optional dyslexia-friendly font stack — load only when user requests it

size._note: All sizes in rem. Base = 16px. Never set font sizes in px — prevents user zoom override.

base.note: Minimum for body text — never go below this for paragraph copy

2xl.note: WCAG large text threshold: >= 18pt (24px) normal, >= 14pt (18.67px) bold

bold.note: Text >= 14pt bold (18.67px) qualifies as WCAG large text — needs only 3:1 contrast ratio

line-height._note: WCAG 1.4.12 requires line height >= 1.5x font size for body text. All values below meet this.

tight.note: Too tight for body text — headings only

snug.note: Too tight for body text — headings only

normal.note: Minimum for body text per WCAG 1.4.12

loose.note: For low-vision users who need more spacing

letter-spacing._note: WCAG 1.4.12: letter spacing >= 0.12em. Users must be able to override without content loss.

tight.note: Negative tracking — avoid for body text
